summary: Iteration 55: Testing New Features - 21/21 Backend Tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified working. Fixed bug in supervisor credentials endpoint.

minor.issue: Returns 500 error when supervisor user doesn't exist in database (NoneType error)
minor.fix_applied: Added null check for supervisor before calling .get() methods

integration_issues.issue: Shows error 'Erreur lors du chargement des informations du superviseur' for old succursales where supervisor user was deleted
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior for orphaned data - backend now returns proper 404 instead of 500

critical_code_review_comments: saas_core.py: POST /api/saas/master-lotteries working correctly - creates lottery and auto-syncs to all companies
saas_core.py: GET /api/saas/master-lotteries returns all lotteries for Super Admin, only active for Company Admin
succursale_routes.py: PUT /{id}/supervisor endpoint allows full modification of supervisor (email, password, name, phone, commission)
succursale_routes.py: GET /{id}/supervisor/credentials returns supervisor info - FIXED null check bug
succursale_routes.py: PUT /{id}/agents/{agent_id}/full allows full modification of agent (email, password, name, phone, commission, limits)
succursale_routes.py: GET /{id}/agents/{agent_id}/credentials returns agent info with all fields
SuperLotteryCatalogPage.js: Create lottery modal has all required fields (name, state_code, state_name, country, game_type, category, draw_times, description, is_active_global)
CompanySuccursalesPage.jsx: Edit supervisor and edit agent modals have all required fields including email and password modification
seed_data_creation: Created test succursales and agents during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working. Fixed supervisor credentials endpoint null check bug. Old succursales may have orphaned supervisor_id references.

master_lottery_creation.auto_sync: Automatically syncs to all active companies when is_active_global=true

supervisor_modification.email_uniqueness: Validates email uniqueness across all users

agent_full_modification.email_uniqueness: Validates email uniqueness across all users

supervisor_credentials_null_check.issue: get_supervisor_credentials endpoint returned 500 error when supervisor user doesn't exist in database
supervisor_credentials_null_check.fix: Added null check: if not supervisor: raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Superviseur non trouvé dans la base de données')

super_lottery_catalog_page.lottery_list: Expandable state sections with lottery table showing Name, Type, Category, Status, Toggle

phase_status: ITERATION 55 COMPLETE - All new features verified working
